description_long: This object is a group of four large fruits, with the central and largest one being a round watermelon. The watermelon has a smooth, hard rind with a light green base color and darker green, irregular striping patterns running lengthwise. The rind appears unblemished and glossy, with no visible stem or cut marks. Surrounding the watermelon are three other melons: a yellow oval melon, a tan cantaloupe with a netted surface, and a greenish oval melon with faint striping. The fruits are arranged in a row, showcasing their distinct shapes, sizes, and surface textures. The overall appearance is fresh and natural, suitable for a market or urban street vendor setting.
description: A group of four large fruits, featuring a round, striped watermelon at the center, flanked by yellow, tan, and green melons with varied surface textures.
description_view_0: All four fruits are visible in a row, with the round, striped watermelon in the center, flanked by a yellow melon on the right and a green-striped melon and tan cantaloupe on the left.
description_view_1: Viewed from above, the round watermelon and yellow melon dominate the foreground, with the green and tan melons partially obscured behind.
description_view_2: The arrangement is mirrored from view 0, with the yellow melon now on the left and the green-striped melon on the right, all fruits clearly visible.
description_view_3: From the opposite top-down angle, the green-striped melon and tan cantaloupe are in the foreground, with the watermelon and yellow melon behind.
attribute_pattern: Irregular, lengthwise striping with alternating light and dark green bands.
attribute_rind_markings: Dark green stripes of varying width and length, with some lighter mottling between stripes.
